title: Golden Insights Color Palettes (.tps)
description: Three ready-to-use Tableau palettes — categorical, sequential, and diverging — in the warm golden style used across the channel. Drop into your Tableau Repository's Preferences.tps (or merge with your existing one) and restart Tableau.

title: UI Shapes Starter Pack
description: 20 transparent PNG shapes (256×256) for Tableau: arrows, chevrons, rings, stars, checkmarks and more, in gold and espresso. Includes install instructions for your Tableau Shapes folder.
